name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Inglewood, CA's 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1244 S Inglewood Ave provides same-day car title loan approvals with convenient hours.
description_long:
The 5 Star Car Title Loans location at 1244 S Inglewood Ave sits in central Inglewood, CA, providing a straightforward car title lending service. This standalone branch operates Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, with extended Saturday hours from 10AM to 5PM, closed Sundays. The accessible storefront location makes it convenient for Inglewood residents needing quick access to title loan services.

At the Inglewood, CA branch, 5 Star Car Title Loans specializes in rapid car title loans, offering same-day approvals to qualified applicants. The team evaluates your vehicle's value and processes your loan efficiently, allowing you to keep your car while accessing funds. Contact the Inglewood location at +1 737-260-7504 to discuss your car title loan options and get pre-approved.

If you're in Inglewood, CA needing quick cash against your vehicle's title, bring your car's title, proof of residency, and a valid ID to the 1244 S Inglewood Ave location. The streamlined application process at 5 Star Car Title Loans takes minutes, not hours. Rates and terms vary by vehicle value and creditworthiness, so call ahead if you have specific questions.
pros: 255,000+ loans funded since 2012 — substantial operational track record
Borrower keeps the vehicle while loan is outstanding
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
Licensed and regulated lender with SSL/TLS-secured application
Accepts applicants with imperfect credit — approval based on vehicle equity
Broad product range: auto, motorcycle, semi-truck title loans plus installment loans
cons: APR and fee ranges not published on the website — no cost transparency before applying
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default
Only available in approximately 18 states — not truly nationwide
On-site review base is very small (11 reviews), limiting independent quality assessment
Loan amounts above $2,000 depend entirely on vehicle value, which many borrowers may not meet
best_for: Car owners with poor or thin credit who cannot qualify for a personal loan
Borrowers facing an urgent, short-term cash shortfall who need same-day funding
People who need more than a payday loan offers but cannot access a bank or credit union
Vehicle owners in one of the ~18 served states who can tolerate high-cost secured debt
diagnosis: Best suited for car owners with damaged credit who face a genuine short-term cash emergency and have exhausted lower-cost options such as credit union PALs, employer advances, or 0% APR credit cards. The primary caveat is that car title loans carry high borrowing costs that are not disclosed upfront on the site, and a missed payment puts the borrower's vehicle — often their means of employment — at risk of repossession.
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1244 S Inglewood Ave, Inglewood, CA offers same-day approvals on car title loans.
